narrative:
Enoch (precinct in Noble County) has 328 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
